title: Spicy Korean Keto Stir Fry
description: A spicy and savory stir fry that's keto-friendly. Use your favorite vegetables and adjust the level of heat to your liking.

ingredients.name: Peppery Stir Fry Beef
ingredients.notes: Slice the beef into thin strips and season with salt and pepper.

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chili flakes and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stir fry sauce and cook for 1 minute.
Add the vegetables and cook until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
